overview: STACKER AL STACKABLE WHEELCHAIR, ALUMINUM CONSTRUCTION With its stackable system it saves the space Easy-to-clean, movable armrests made of durable plastic material Aluminum Construction Seat and back section made up of strong plastic material in terms of providing patient comfort Front wheel system can rotate 360 degrees around itself Urine bag hook Central locking system at parking position Foot pedal that stands in off position during the park position Smart locking mechanism (optional) Safety belt (optional)
